sections.paragraph:
Original: עבד

Transliteration: ‛ăbad

Phonetic: ab-bad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to make, do
    1. (Peal)
      1. to make, create
      2. to do, perform
    2. (Ithpeal)
      1. to be made into
      2. to be done, be wrought, be performed, be executed, be carried out

Origin: corresponding to H5647

TWOT entry: 2896

Part(s) of speech: Verb
